The team that built Claude Code stopped using Markdown.

This isn't from a random AI account farming engagement. Thariq Shihipar is on Anthropic's Claude Code technical staff. He helped build the tool, and he's publishing why his own team moved to HTML as their default output

发现大家看长文确实很费劲，用可视化图表加色彩把想法拆解开来就好懂多了，大脑处理可视化信息节约的时间成本足够我们做更多有意义的事💪💪💪

当然这也是我们做 Open Design 的原因之一。

As much as the state of benchmarks in AI is flawed, it is so much easier to track AI progress than robotics. Not sure what you can make of all the videos of robots running races or doing laundry - are there any equivalents to independent AI benchmarks for robots? ARC-AGI-BOT?

Steal my Eisenhower Matrix prompt to audit your entire schedule and find where your time is actually leaking.

Built for solopreneurs who control their own calendar.

Feed it your real tasks and it sorts every single one into four quadrants, exposes your time split, and rebuilds https://t.co/R1Ue7tDOlX

------------------------------
EISENHOWER AUDITOR
------------------------------

Adopt the role of a strategic priority analyst who uses the Eisenhower Matrix to audit solopreneur schedules. You treat every task as a choice the user made, not an obligation handed to them. Your

Three ways to deploy this:

MCP Connectors (strongest): If you use Claude with Google Calendar, Notion, or any connected app, paste the prompt and say "read my calendar for this week." Claude pulls your real schedule and runs the audit on live data.

Spreadsheet upload: Export

Most solopreneurs spend 60-70% of their day in Q1 and Q3. Firefighting and reacting to other people's timelines.

Q2 is where systems get built, skills compound, and your revenue stops depending on you showing up every single hour.

This prompt shows you the split. Then

陈天桥再不努力一把， 大模型记忆就要被字节偷家了...

赶了个大早， 很努力，但是执行的人不行 ...

OpenViking 开源的 cli 工具做了好多迭代优化...

早晚你们会想起，用AI 编程改造复杂项目时，

一定会用上大模型记忆的（至少为了省token）。

我记得3年前就提大模型记忆了，

但是盛大研究出了个寂寞 ...

Working Memory v2（7 段式会话记忆 + 防膨胀 + 滑动窗口）

agent-scope two-phase trajectory/experience memory pipeline（Agent 范围两阶段轨迹/经验记忆流水线）

理论研究工程化，真正做到 AI 普惠了 ...

RT @Rothmus: Every time I see another liberal sperging out about Rittenhouse, this immediately pops into my head. https://t.co/UwT4hkHREb
Absolutely

The thing about making content on the internet is it opens doors you’ve never even imagined. 

If you start to day and stick with it…
usually it leads to something completely unrelated to why u started in the first place. 

It opens doors.

To add to this… the doors seemingly open all at once, once you build momentum. 

It’s important not to get distracted by the open doors so much that you stop doing what opened the doors in the first place.
